stemHtml:
Refer to figure or CAP 698 file 3.6.
Elevation: 10 000 ft
Temperature: 10°C
Take-off mass: 4000 lb
Ground speed: 110 kt
Cloud base: 200 ft
Obstacle distance: 0.5 NM from threshold
Obstacle height: 72 ft above threshold
Correction from gross to net: 1.3
Formulas: Distance: height gain/ROC x GS/60 NM Height gain: distance/GS x ROC x 60/6080ft

Given the following information, determine the obstacle clearance in the departure area.
